name: @allons-y/skill-structured-data
description: Inject or generate schema.org structured data (HTML Microdata or JSON-LD) into web markup, then validate it. Picks the right format per project, injects at build/server-render time only, and emits a reviewable diff instead of overwriting files.

triggers: add structured data / rich snippets / SEO markup
validate, audit, or fix my structured data
should I use Microdata or JSON-LD
